# Flow Experiment

**Summary**: Experimental testing of fluid movement through pipes to measure pressure drop and drag reduction.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] conducted flow experiments of EAS before and after adding CNDs to investigate its efficacy in drag reduction.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The results showed that CNDs successfully reduced drag in the pipes, increasing pumping rates and saving energy. ([[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023, p. 71]])
